steps.title: Reinforce the extreme difference
steps.content: The sentence says the differences between the two editions are extreme, even by James's standards. The next clause intensifies that point by noting that some critics treat the editions as two different novels.

steps.title: Reject contrast and restatement
steps.content: A signals opposition, but the critics' view supports the prior claim. C signals concession, which would imply a contrast that is not present. D signals a restatement, but the second clause strengthens the point rather than merely rephrasing it. The answer is B.
